name: agent_generated_gns3_mcp
description: Complete GNS3 (Graphical Network Simulator-3) integration through MCP. Ensures the local GNS3 server is running, manages topologies via REST, sends console commands with optional login, and runs guest SSH commands.
description_for_agent: GNS3 MCP server for network topology management and simulation. Tools ensure localhost gns3server is up (auto-start), manage projects/nodes/links, send device console commands (login_username/login_password), and execute guest shell commands over SSH (gns3_ssh_exec).

GNS3_SERVER_URL.description: GNS3 server URL (default: http://localhost:3080). Can be overridden per tool call.

GNS3_USERNAME.description: GNS3 server username for REST API authentication.

GNS3_PASSWORD.description: GNS3 server password for REST API authentication.

GNS3_VERIFY_SSL.description: Verify TLS certificates for GNS3 REST (default true). Set false for local/self-signed.

GNS3_SERVER_START_CMD.description: Custom command to start gns3server. If unset, default gns3server gets --host/--port from GNS3_SERVER_URL. Custom values are never rewritten.

GNS3_SERVER_START_TIMEOUT.description: Seconds to wait for GNS3 after auto-start (default 30).

GNS3_SERVER_HEALTHY_CACHE_SECONDS.description: Skip re-probe window after a healthy check (default 30).

GNS3_CONSOLE_USER.description: Default console login username for gns3_send_console_commands (override with login_username).

GNS3_CONSOLE_PASSWORD.description: Default console login password for gns3_send_console_commands (override with login_password).

GNS3_SSH_USER.description: Default guest SSH username for gns3_ssh_exec (override with ssh_username).

GNS3_SSH_PASSWORD.description: Default guest SSH password for gns3_ssh_exec (override with ssh_password).

GNS3_SSH_HOST_KEY_POLICY.description: SSH host-key policy: accept_new (default, accept any), strict (known_hosts), warn (accept and log fingerprint).
